Who I Am

About Me

I'm Raihan Abeer — a Digital Marketer and Creative Designer based in Bangladesh with 3 years of hands-on experience helping brands grow, stand out, and convert.

I've worked with clients from 15+ countries, delivering 33+ successful projects across industries. My work sits at the intersection of data-driven strategy and bold creative execution.

📊
Data-Driven Marketing
Every campaign backed by analytics, research, and real performance metrics.
🎨

Visuals that stop the scroll and communicate your brand's story instantly.
🌍
Global Clients

🏆
Certified Professional
Google, Meta, HubSpot and industry-recognized certifications in my belt.
